description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with three visible stories, featuring a flat roof with green spaces and a rooftop terrace. The facade is predominantly white with large, square windows arranged in a regular pattern, and the ground floor includes a covered carport with two parked cars. The driveway is wide and extends to the street, flanked by several trees and landscaped greenery. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines, a rooftop garden, and a wooden deck area on the upper floor. The entryway is recessed under the main structure, providing shelter and direct access to the carport. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, three-story cubic house with a flat roof, rooftop garden, and a covered carport, featuring white facades and large square windows. The design is minimalist with landscaped surroundings and a wide driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered carport with two cars, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, rooftop garden, and extended driveway with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, green roof, and additional landscaping behind the house.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the carport, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway with trees lining the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry under the main structure with a covered carport, minimal steps, and no decorative columns or overhangs.
